note: IEA estimates 2024 data center electricity consumption at around 415 TWh.
IEA Base Case projects global data center electricity consumption around 945 TWh by 2030.
IEA states data center electricity demand grows around 15 percent per year in the Base Case.
IEA projects accelerated server electricity consumption to grow by around 30 percent annually in the Base Case.
Micron forecast HBM TAM from approximately USD 35bn in 2025.
Micron forecast HBM TAM around USD 100bn in 2028.
Micron forecast roughly 40 percent CAGR for HBM TAM through calendar 2028.

NVIDIA reported Q1 FY2027 revenue of USD 81.615bn. / NVIDIA reported total revenue up 85 percent year over year. / NVIDIA reported record Data Center revenue of USD 75.2bn. / NVIDIA reported Data Center revenue up 92 percent year over year.
Broadcom CEO commentary attributed Q4 revenue growth primarily to AI semiconductor revenue increasing 74 percent year over year.
Marvell stated FY2026 revenue grew 42 percent year over year driven by robust AI demand.

TSMC stated 3-nanometer technologies represented 24 percent of total wafer revenue in 2025. / TSMC stated 7nm and beyond accounted for 74 percent of total wafer revenue in 2025. / TSMC reported 15.0 million 12-inch equivalent wafer shipments in 2025. / TSMC stated annual capacity of facilities managed by TSMC and subsidiaries exceeded 17 million 12-inch equivalent wafers in 2025.
Dell reported Q1 FY2027 AI-optimized servers revenue of USD 16.132bn. / Dell reported AI-optimized servers revenue up 757 percent year over year.
